interface.shortDescription: Plan safe Git, pull request, and release work
interface.longDescription: Plan safe branches, commits, pull requests, release notes, and issue synchronization. Migrated workflows: $git-commit-plan, $git-create-branch, $git-pr-review, $git-release-notes, $git-sync-issues. This Codex-native edition packages explicit workflows as skills, records sensitive actions as explicit-only, and uses portable installed-skill paths.
